## Summary

Describe the user-facing or system-facing change.

## Testing

- [ ] `backend`: `pytest`
- [ ] `dashboard`: `npm run build`
- [ ] `mobile`: `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] Not applicable

List any additional validation that was run.

## Risk

Describe migration, auth, API, realtime, or rollout risk. If there is no material risk, say so explicitly.

## Documentation

- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] No documentation changes required

## Screenshots or Artifacts

Include screenshots, recordings, traces, or load reports when they materially help review.
